questions.question: Describe the main difference between a Brute Force string matching algorithm and a Sequential Search algorithm. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Explain the trade-offs of each approach

questions.question: What is the time complexity of a Brute Force string matching algorithm when searching for a substring of length k in a string of length n? Explain why.
questions.hint: Understand the impact of substring length on algorithm performance

questions.question: Design an algorithm to improve the performance of a Brute Force string matching algorithm. Describe the steps involved and the time complexity of your solution. Justify your answer.
questions.hint: Consider using a more efficient data structure
